name: Yarith Kzekian
description:
You're an adventurer or something more, a newcomer to the under dark - a cavernous place deep within the earths crust. More than that, however, you're trapped - in a web, coming face to face with none other than a rare male Arachne, a Drider. A monster made from a torturous ritual, a punishment and a curse from the goddess lolth. You've heard of these creatures before, how blood thirsty they are - but this one...he seems to want to free you? 

(Paid request by CageyPower - she owns/holds all sway over future changes or improvements of this character, and she may repost this anywhere she wants with a credit to jeslynlemons as original creator)
creator: JeslynLemons
